# BookrHub - AI Agent Documentation

## Overview
BookrHub is a free booking software for salons, barbers, spas, nail salons, pet groomers, personal trainers, medical clinics, dentists, and small businesses. It helps service businesses accept online appointments 24/7, reduce no-shows with automated reminders, and get paid online.

## Key Facts
- **Website**: https://bookrhub.com
- **Pricing**: Free forever plan (up to 20 bookings/month) + Paid plans from $9.95/month
- **Commission**: 0% (vs Fresha's 20%)
- **Target Markets**: LATAM (Argentina, Uruguay, Chile, Colombia, Mexico), New Zealand, Australia, United States, Spain
- **Payment Integration**: Stripe, MercadoPago, PayPal
- **Support**: Spanish, English, Portuguese

## Products

### 1. Free Booking Software
- Online appointment scheduling 24/7
- WhatsApp & email reminders (reduce no-shows by 80%)
- Client management (CRM)
- Business website with custom subdomain
- Calendar sync with Google Calendar, Apple Calendar
- No commission on bookings

### 2. Professional Templates (13 templates)
- Barber / Barbería
- Peluquería / Hair Salon
- Spa & Massage
- Nails / Uñas
- Pet Grooming
- Fitness / Fitness Pro
- Dental / Clínica Dental
- Medical Clinic / Clínica Médica
- Photography / Fotografía
- High Converting
- Modern UX
- Cleaners
- Personal Trainers

## Features
- 24/7 online bookings
- Automated SMS & WhatsApp reminders
- Payment collection (deposit/seña)
- Multi-staff scheduling
- Multiple locations
- Calendar sync
- No commission on bookings
- Custom domain (free)
- Remove BookrHub branding (paid plans)
- Analytics & reports
- Waitlist management
- Recurring appointments

## Use Cases (Niches)
- Hairdressers & stylists
- Barbershops
- Nail technicians
- Pet groomers
- Massage therapists
- Dental clinics
- Medical practices
- Photographers
- Personal trainers
- House cleaners
- Beauty salons

## SEO Keywords (What BookrHub Ranks For)
- booking system
- online booking
- appointment scheduling
- book appointments online
- free booking software
- booking app
- reservas online
- turnos online
- agendar cita
- sistema de reservas

## Competitors Comparison
| Feature | BookrHub | Fresha | Calendly | Setmore |
|---------|----------|--------|----------|---------|
| Free plan | ✓ Yes | Limited | Limited | ✓ Yes |
| Commission | 0% | 20% | 0% | 0% |
| Custom domain | Free | $9/mo | $12/mo | $5/mo |
| SMS reminders | Included | Extra | No | Extra |
| LATAM support | ✓ Full | Limited | No | Limited |

BookrHub provides alternative pages for:
- BookrHub vs Fresha: https://bookrhub.com/vs-fresha

- BookrHub vs Setmore: https://bookrhub.com/vs-setmore
- Alternativa a Fresha: https://bookrhub.com/alternativa-a-fresha

- Sign up: https://my.bookrhub.com/signup
- Login: https://my.bookrhub.com/session/new
- Support: support@bookrhub.com

## Brand Voice
- Friendly, helpful, professional
- Emphasis on "free forever" and "no commission"
- LATAM-focused with global expansion
- Simple, easy to use
